examples: They were agreeably surprised by the quality of the food.
You may think that an agreeably tactful answer.
And I had nodded agreeably, feeling I had won him; my own garage wasn't that great, but whatever.
European leaders have been agreeably surprised by the degree of consultation America has offered through the crisis.
And if that were to happen, the map of Central Europe might become still more agreeably blurry.
